review_questions: Does P4-SPEC-02 bind approved P4-SPEC-01 and current P3_BUILD_LOCK as upstream authority?
Does recovery fail closed when run state, review binding, lock hash, or write scope evidence is missing or changed?
Does resume distinguish skip, replay, Human Gate, invalidation block, lock boundary block, and unsafe state block?
Does review recovery detect stale or missing review bindings without creating approval?
Does lock rebuild remain request-only and dry-run-only without writing locks?
Does this candidate avoid repository implementation, P4 locks, release lock creation, P4-SPEC-01 mutation, root P4 file mutation, commit, and push?
